name: codex-pdf-tools
description: Lightweight local PDF tools for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Small local PDF operations for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Codex PDF Tools exposes lightweight local PDF commands for inspecting, merging, splitting, extracting, deleting, rotating, reordering, and encrypting PDF files.
defaultPrompt: Inspect this PDF and tell me how many pages it has.
Merge these PDFs into one file.
